dashboard.title: Farmer Dashboard
dashboard.allCropsHarvested: All crops have been harvested or listed

tips.waterManagementDesc: Drip irrigation can save up to 60% water. Monitor soil moisture regularly and irrigate based on crop needs.
tips.waterManagementDescLong: Drip irrigation can save up to 60% water compared to traditional methods. Consider installing it for better water efficiency and higher yields.
tips.optimalPlantingDesc: Kharif season (June-October) is ideal for rice, cotton, and maize. Rabi season (October-March) is best for wheat, mustard, and chickpeas.
tips.marketTrendsDesc: Organic produce demand is growing by 25% annually. Consider transitioning to organic farming for premium prices and better market access.
tips.postHarvestStorageDesc: Proper storage can reduce post-harvest losses by 30-40%. Use our warehouse booking feature to secure climate-controlled storage.
tips.governmentSchemeDesc: PM-KISAN scheme now provides ₹6,000 annual support. Ensure your KYC is updated to receive benefits directly in your bank account.
